THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SABA, BEVERLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 164 EUREKA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-01-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, EVICTION STAYED THRU 9-30-96 AT 11:59PM. DFT TO PAY TO PLTF $445 ON 9/1/96 & $445 ON 9/15/96 AS AUG & SEPT RENT. IF DEFT FAILS TO PAY, PLTF MAY MOVE TO LIFT STAY. IF DFT FAILS TO VACATE TIMELY, DEFT TO PAY ATNYS FEES OF $900 & COSTS UPON PETITION OF PLTF. NO FURTHER STAYS. SEE JUDGMNT FOR DETAILS.
